svg.text: FastAPI . Celery . Supabase . Redis . PTB . Telethon . 14-source scanner pipeline
AFTER kick: DEL sentinel . hourly audit.cleanup_matkap_bots scan
CLAIM_TIMEOUT=15min (was 5 -- too short for 750s worst-case batch)
named vol -- no task storm on restart
discovered_credentials id . bot_token_enc . status CHECK(pending/active/revoked/cold) . source . chat_id . topic_id . score . meta(jsonb)
exfiltrated_messages id . cred_id . content . is_broadcasted . broadcast_claimed_at . topic_id . telegram_msg_id
telegram_accounts id . session_path . status . locked_by . locked_until
audit_logs id . event_type . actor . details(jsonb, tokens REDACTED) . created_at [pruned weekly 90d]
Indexes: idx_msgs_broadcast_queue(is_broadcasted=F partial) . idx_msgs_claimed_at . idx_creds_source . idx_exfilt_claimed + status CHECK
sessions /app/sessions Telethon .session files (SQLite integrity-checked on boot)
beat vol prevents task storm on restart (lost /tmp was root cause of all scanners firing at once)
Token redaction: _redact_details() strips Telegram token pattern
from audit_log details before DB write + log()
Own-bot guard: 2 layers -- scanner output + validator entry
CORS: explicit allowlist, EXTRA_CORS_ORIGINS env escape
Session health: SQLite check on scan; corrupt -> .corrupt.{ts}
(was same key -- release_lock silently cleared cooldown)
Rate limiter: TTL set on count==1 OR ttl<0 (pipeline-race fix)
Broadcast pool: bots only -- MTProto restricted to admin ops
Async guard: _is_monitor_group() raises RuntimeError if called
from running event loop (forces callers to async path)
Stale claim: CLAIM_TIMEOUT=15min (was 5 -- shorter than 750s batch)
lock never expires mid 750s worst-case batch
Matkap crash: sentinel key TTL=3600s survives worker death
Session lease: entrypoint clears locked_by/locked_until on start
Beat persist: named volume -- no task storm on container restart
Poll conflict: 3-retry loop 10s backoff on PTB Conflict
scan_retry: retryable=true + last_gate_at<6h (no full cold scan)
Session corrupt: renamed .session.corrupt.{ts}, excluded from pool
task_acks_late: message re-queued if worker dies mid-task
MUST -- getMe rate limit key is per-worker-process. count==1 TTL fix applied but at scale
2+ validator workers they use different Redis keys, losing the per-IP rate window
Fix: shared key across all workers (single namespace, no per-process prefix)
SHOULD -- user_agent busy-wait under load (196 tasks / 4 sessions). worker-scrape=1
serialises tasks but no backpressure on session acquisition retry loops
SHOULD -- Flood control errors in broadcast log (visible above). 1 bot token at 1.5s/msg
floods are expected under large backlogs. Fix: add more credentials or reduce batch
Split deferred: skill telegramhunter-refactor-monoliths saved, safe as-is
LOW -- _run_sync() in both celery_app.py (canonical) and scanner_tasks.py (compat)
INFO -- All 26 May 2026 audit items + 13 blocker items resolved
